description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a slim build, wearing a long-sleeved, horizontally striped sweater and knee-length shorts. The figure has a distinct head with a pronounced jawline, large glasses, and a full beard, giving a scholarly or intellectual appearance. The arms are extended outward in a T-pose, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The legs are covered with tight leggings or socks, and the feet are clad in simple, rounded shoes. The hair is voluminous and swept to the side, with a clear parting visible from the back. The overall look is casual and modern, suitable for an urban pedestrian scenario.
description: A stylized adult male pedestrian in casual attire, featuring a striped sweater, shorts, glasses, and a full beard, standing in a T-pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with glasses, full beard, striped sweater, shorts, and extended arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, glasses, beard, and the length of the sweater and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair parting, sweater, and shorts, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, glasses, beard, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved sweater and knee-length shorts with leggings
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length swept hair with side part
